import React from "react"; import data from "../data/predictions.json"; import { LineChart, Line, XAxis, YAxis, Tooltip, CartesianGrid, ResponsiveContainer, BarChart, Bar, Legend } from "recharts"; const Predictions = () => { const samples = data.samples.slice(0, 20); const states = data.state_preds.slice(0, 15); const groupData = Object.entries(data.group_metrics).map( ([group, metrics]) => ({ group, mae: metrics.mae, color: metrics.color }) ); return (

Model Predictions

Model: {data.model}

MAE: {data.overall.mae} | RMSE: {data.overall.rmse} | R²: {data.overall.r2}

Fairness Ratio: {data.overall.fairness_ratio}

{/* Actual vs Predicted */}

Actual vs Predicted (Top Samples)

{/* State Chart */}

State Predictions

{/* Fairness Chart */}

Group MAE (Fairness)

{groupData.map((entry, index) => ( ))}
); }; export default Predictions;
